chk_lat_range.name: chk_lat_range
chk_lat_range.value: "addresses"."latitude" IS NULL OR (CAST("addresses"."latitude" AS REAL) BETWEEN -90.0 AND 90.0)

chk_lon_range.name: chk_lon_range
chk_lon_range.value: "addresses"."longitude" IS NULL OR (CAST("addresses"."longitude" AS REAL) BETWEEN -180.0 AND 180.0)

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("addresses"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "addresses"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

audit_logs_default_chk_error_message.name: audit_logs_default_chk_error_message
audit_logs_default_chk_error_message.value: ("audit_logs_default"."success" = 1 AND "audit_logs_default"."error_message" IS NULL) OR ("audit_logs_default"."success" = 0 AND "audit_logs_default"."error_message" IS NOT NULL)

audit_logs_default_chk_user_or_store.name: audit_logs_default_chk_user_or_store
audit_logs_default_chk_user_or_store.value: "audit_logs_default"."user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "audit_logs_default"."store_id" IS NOT NULL

chk_cart_owner_exists.name: chk_cart_owner_exists
chk_cart_owner_exists.value:
("cart_items"."session_id" IS NOT NULL OR "cart_items"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL) 
        AND NOT ("cart_items"."session_id" IS NOT NULL AND "cart_items"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL)

categories_store_parent_idx.name: categories_store_parent_idx
categories_store_parent_idx.where: "categories"."parent_id" IS NOT NULL AND "categories"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("categories"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "categories"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

chat_sessions_user_platform_idx.name: chat_sessions_user_platform_idx
chat_sessions_user_platform_idx.where: "chat_sessions"."user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "chat_sessions"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_session_routing_integrity.name: chk_session_routing_integrity
chk_session_routing_integrity.value: ("chat_sessions"."platform" = 'web' AND "chat_sessions"."store_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("chat_sessions"."platform" IN ('telegram', 'whatsapp', 'messenger') AND length("chat_sessions"."external_id") > 0)

chk_state_step.name: chk_state_step
chk_state_step.value:
json_extract("chat_sessions"."state", '$.step') IS NULL 
        OR json_extract("chat_sessions"."state", '$.step') IN ('phone','name','store','niche','completed','expired')

chk_visitor_fingerprint.name: chk_visitor_fingerprint
chk_visitor_fingerprint.value:
"chat_sessions"."visitor_fingerprint" IS NULL 
        OR (
          length("chat_sessions"."visitor_fingerprint") = 64 
          AND "chat_sessions"."visitor_fingerprint" GLOB '[a-fA-F0-9]*'
          AND "chat_sessions"."visitor_fingerprint" NOT GLOB '*[^a-fA-F0-9]*'
        )

chk_max_discount_positive.name: chk_max_discount_positive
chk_max_discount_positive.value: "coupons"."max_discount_amount" IS NULL OR CAST("coupons"."max_discount_amount" AS REAL) > 0.0

chk_percentage_range.name: chk_percentage_range
chk_percentage_range.value: "coupons"."type" != 'percentage' OR (CAST("coupons"."value" AS REAL) >= 1.0 AND CAST("coupons"."value" AS REAL) <= 100.0)

chk_coupon_dates.name: chk_coupon_dates
chk_coupon_dates.value:
"coupons"."starts_at" IS NULL OR 
      "coupons"."expires_at" IS NULL OR 
      "coupons"."expires_at" > "coupons"."starts_at"

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("coupons"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "coupons"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

idx_custom_domains_expires.name: idx_custom_domains_expires
idx_custom_domains_expires.where: "custom_domains"."domain_expires_at" IS NOT NULL AND "custom_domains"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_domain_format.name: chk_domain_format
chk_domain_format.value:
"custom_domains"."domain" GLOB '*.*' 
        AND "custom_domains"."domain" NOT GLOB '*..*'
        AND "custom_domains"."domain" NOT GLOB '*[!a-z0-9.-]*'

chk_ssl_consistency.name: chk_ssl_consistency
chk_ssl_consistency.value: ("custom_domains"."ssl_status" != 'active') OR ("custom_domains"."ssl_status" = 'active' AND "custom_domains"."ssl_certificate_at" IS NOT NULL AND "custom_domains"."ssl_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)

chk_subdomain_consistency.name: chk_subdomain_consistency
chk_subdomain_consistency.value: ("custom_domains"."is_subdomain" = 0 AND "custom_domains"."parent_domain" IS NULL) OR ("custom_domains"."is_subdomain" = 1 AND "custom_domains"."parent_domain" IS NOT NULL)

customers_email_unique.name: customers_email_unique
customers_email_unique.where: "customers"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "customers"."deleted_at" IS NULL

customers_telegram_unique.name: customers_telegram_unique
customers_telegram_unique.where: "customers"."telegram_chat_id" IS NOT NULL AND "customers"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("customers"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "customers"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

chk_preferences_currency.name: chk_preferences_currency
chk_preferences_currency.value:
json_extract("customers"."preferences", '$.currency') IS NULL 
      OR json_extract("customers"."preferences", '$.currency') GLOB '[A-Z][A-Z][A-Z]'

chk_group_prices.name: chk_group_prices
chk_group_prices.value: CAST("group_buys"."group_price" AS REAL) < CAST("group_buys"."original_price" AS REAL)

chk_group_buy_deleted_consistency.name: chk_group_buy_deleted_consistency
chk_group_buy_deleted_consistency.value: ("group_buys"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "group_buys"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

chk_discount_limit.name: chk_discount_limit
chk_discount_limit.value: CAST("haggle_sessions"."discount_amount" AS REAL) <= (CAST("haggle_sessions"."original_price" AS REAL) - CAST("haggle_sessions"."min_allowed_price" AS REAL))

chk_final_price_upper.name: chk_final_price_upper
chk_final_price_upper.value: "haggle_sessions"."final_price" IS NULL OR CAST("haggle_sessions"."final_price" AS REAL) <= CAST("haggle_sessions"."original_price" AS REAL)

chk_final_price_lower.name: chk_final_price_lower
chk_final_price_lower.value: "haggle_sessions"."final_price" IS NULL OR CAST("haggle_sessions"."final_price" AS REAL) >= CAST("haggle_sessions"."min_allowed_price" AS REAL)

chk_strategy_required.name: chk_strategy_required
chk_strategy_required.value: ("haggle_sessions"."status" NOT IN ('accepted', 'rejected') OR "haggle_sessions"."strategy_used" IS NOT NULL)

chk_haggle_deleted_consistency.name: chk_haggle_deleted_consistency
chk_haggle_deleted_consistency.value: ("haggle_sessions"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "haggle_sessions"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

media_product_order_idx.name: media_product_order_idx
media_product_order_idx.where: "media"."product_id" IS NOT NULL AND "media"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_order_total_calculation.name: chk_order_total_calculation
chk_order_total_calculation.value:
CAST("orders"."total" AS REAL) = (
        CAST("orders"."subtotal" AS REAL) + 
        CAST("orders"."shipping_cost" AS REAL) + 
        CAST("orders"."tax_amount" AS REAL) - 
        CAST("orders"."discount" AS REAL)
      )

chk_recipient_phone.name: chk_recipient_phone
chk_recipient_phone.value: json_extract("orders"."shipping_address", '$.recipientPhone') IS NOT NULL AND json_extract("orders"."shipping_address", '$.recipientPhone') != ''

chk_recipient_name.name: chk_recipient_name
chk_recipient_name.value: json_extract("orders"."shipping_address", '$.recipientName') IS NOT NULL AND json_extract("orders"."shipping_address", '$.recipientName') != ''

chk_country.name: chk_country
chk_country.value: json_extract("orders"."shipping_address", '$.country') IS NOT NULL AND json_extract("orders"."shipping_address", '$.country') != ''

chk_discount_legit.name: chk_discount_legit
chk_discount_legit.value: CAST("orders"."discount" AS REAL) <= CAST("orders"."subtotal" AS REAL)

chk_haggle_legit.name: chk_haggle_legit
chk_haggle_legit.value: ("orders"."haggle_session_id" IS NULL) OR (CAST("orders"."haggle_discount" AS REAL) <= COALESCE(CAST("orders"."original_total" AS REAL), 0.0))

chk_coupon_consistency.name: chk_coupon_consistency
chk_coupon_consistency.value: ("orders"."coupon_id" IS NULL) OR ("orders"."coupon_code" IS NOT NULL)

chk_shipped_after_confirmed.name: chk_shipped_after_confirmed
chk_shipped_after_confirmed.value: ("orders"."shipped_at" IS NULL OR ("orders"."confirmed_at" IS NOT NULL AND "orders"."shipped_at" >= "orders"."confirmed_at"))

chk_delivered_after_shipped.name: chk_delivered_after_shipped
chk_delivered_after_shipped.value: ("orders"."delivered_at" IS NULL OR ("orders"."shipped_at" IS NOT NULL AND "orders"."delivered_at" >= "orders"."shipped_at"))

chk_refund_amount_positive.name: chk_refund_amount_positive
chk_refund_amount_positive.value: ("orders"."refund_amount" IS NULL OR CAST("orders"."refund_amount" AS REAL) > 0.0)

chk_refund_amount_max.name: chk_refund_amount_max
chk_refund_amount_max.value: ("orders"."refund_amount" IS NULL OR CAST("orders"."refund_amount" AS REAL) <= CAST("orders"."total" AS REAL))

chk_refund_consistency.name: chk_refund_consistency
chk_refund_consistency.value: ("orders"."refunded_at" IS NULL OR "orders"."refund_amount" IS NOT NULL)

chk_original_total_exists.name: chk_original_total_exists
chk_original_total_exists.value: ("orders"."haggle_session_id" IS NULL) OR ("orders"."original_total" IS NOT NULL)

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("orders"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "orders"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

chk_key_format.name: chk_key_format
chk_key_format.value:
"platform_settings"."key" GLOB '[a-z0-9]*'
        AND "platform_settings"."key" NOT GLOB '*..*'
        AND "platform_settings"."key" NOT GLOB '*__*'
        AND "platform_settings"."key" NOT GLOB '*.-*'
        AND "platform_settings"."key" NOT GLOB '*-.*'

products_sku_unique.name: products_sku_unique
products_sku_unique.where: "products"."sku" IS NOT NULL AND "products"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_compare_at_price.name: chk_compare_at_price
chk_compare_at_price.value: "products"."compare_at_price" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."compare_at_price" AS REAL) >= CAST("products"."price" AS REAL)

chk_cost_non_negative.name: chk_cost_non_negative
chk_cost_non_negative.value: "products"."cost" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."cost" AS REAL) >= 0.0

chk_cost_price.name: chk_cost_price
chk_cost_price.value: "products"."cost" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."cost" AS REAL) <= CAST("products"."price" AS REAL)

chk_min_price_non_negative.name: chk_min_price_non_negative
chk_min_price_non_negative.value: "products"."min_price" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."min_price" AS REAL) >= 0.0

chk_min_price_limit.name: chk_min_price_limit
chk_min_price_limit.value: "products"."min_price" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."min_price" AS REAL) <= CAST("products"."price" AS REAL)

chk_weight_positive.name: chk_weight_positive
chk_weight_positive.value: "products"."weight" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."weight" AS REAL) > 0.0

chk_length_positive.name: chk_length_positive
chk_length_positive.value: "products"."length" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."length" AS REAL) > 0.0

chk_width_positive.name: chk_width_positive
chk_width_positive.value: "products"."width" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."width" AS REAL) > 0.0

chk_height_positive.name: chk_height_positive
chk_height_positive.value: "products"."height" IS NULL OR CAST("products"."height" AS REAL) > 0.0

reviews_customer_product_unique.name: reviews_customer_product_unique
reviews_customer_product_unique.where: customer_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

reviews_order_product_unique.name: reviews_order_product_unique
reviews_order_product_unique.where: order_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

chk_title_length.name: chk_title_length
chk_title_length.value: "reviews"."title" IS NULL OR length("reviews"."title") BETWEEN 1 AND 200

chk_replied_consistency.name: chk_replied_consistency
chk_replied_consistency.value: ("reviews"."reply" IS NULL AND "reviews"."replied_at" IS NULL) OR ("reviews"."reply" IS NOT NULL AND "reviews"."replied_at" IS NOT NULL)

stores_telegram_chat_unique.name: stores_telegram_chat_unique
stores_telegram_chat_unique.where: "stores"."telegram_chat_id" IS NOT NULL AND "stores"."deleted_at" IS NULL

stores_telegram_username_unique.name: stores_telegram_username_unique
stores_telegram_username_unique.where: "stores"."telegram_username" IS NOT NULL AND "stores"."deleted_at" IS NULL

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("stores"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "stores"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)

chk_message_ownership.name: chk_message_ownership
chk_message_ownership.value: NOT ("telegram_messages"."store_id" IS NULL AND "telegram_messages"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_command_format.name: chk_command_format
chk_command_format.value: "telegram_messages"."command" IS NULL OR ("telegram_messages"."command" GLOB '/*' AND length("telegram_messages"."command") <= 50)

chk_delivered_consistency.name: chk_delivered_consistency
chk_delivered_consistency.value: ("telegram_messages"."status" IN ('pending', 'sent') AND "telegram_messages"."delivered_at" IS NULL) OR ("telegram_messages"."status" NOT IN ('pending', 'sent'))

chk_read_consistency.name: chk_read_consistency
chk_read_consistency.value: ("telegram_messages"."status" IN ('pending', 'sent', 'delivered') AND "telegram_messages"."read_at" IS NULL) OR ("telegram_messages"."status" NOT IN ('pending', 'sent', 'delivered'))

chk_failure_consistency.name: chk_failure_consistency
chk_failure_consistency.value: ("telegram_messages"."status" != 'failed' AND "telegram_messages"."failure_reason" IS NULL) OR ("telegram_messages"."status" = 'failed' AND "telegram_messages"."failure_reason" IS NOT NULL)

chk_identity_exists.name: chk_identity_exists
chk_identity_exists.value: ("user"."email" IS NOT NULL OR "user"."phone_number" IS NOT NULL OR "user"."telegram_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_deleted_by_consistency.name: chk_deleted_by_consistency
chk_deleted_by_consistency.value: ("user"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR "user"."deleted_by" IS NOT NULL)
